targets.query:
from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_readings")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id =~ /^${machine:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_readings")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "rpm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id =~ /^${machine:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_readings")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "pressure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.machine_id =~ /^${machine:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_readings")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.metric == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> group(columns: ["machine_id"])
  |> mean()

from(bucket: "iot")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua_energy")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "energy_kwh")
  |> group(columns: ["machine_id"])
  |> mean()
